memory:memory/2026-03-31.md:35:93.snippet: 9. `Makefile`, `sim.sh` — Build automation --- ## 🔧 TurboQuant Interface Specification ### Control Signals (E1 Connector) | Signal | Pin | Description | |--------|-----|-------------| | SER | DIO0_P (G18) | Serial data to 74HC595 | | SRCLK | DIO0_N (G17) | Shift register clock | | RCLK | DIO1_P (H17) | Latch clock | ### Timing - SPI Clock: 1 MHz (derived from 125 MHz system clock) - Shift out: 8 bits × 1 μs = 8 μs - Latch: < 1 μs - **Total switch time: ~10 μs** - **Max scan rate: 100,000 elements/second** ### Data Flow ``` Python Host → [element_select: 0-7] → FPGA Controller → 74HC595 → GATE0-7 → TurboQuant ↓ Red Pitaya ADC IN1/IN2 ←───────────
